methods.name: bootstrap
methods.desc:
Bootstraps the vault: sets USDC asset and opts-in.
Admin only.

methods.name: depositFirst
methods.desc:
Deposits USDC into the vault for the first time.
Requires a payment txn to cover MBR.

methods.name: depositMore
methods.desc: Deposits more USDC into the vault for existing users.

methods.name: fundReserves
methods.desc: Admin method to fund the yield reserves.

methods.name: getBalance
methods.desc: External view of balance including accrued yield.

usdcAssetId.desc: The asset ID of the USDC used in this vault

reserveBalance.desc: Balance of the vault that belongs to reserves (yield runway)

deposits.desc: User balance in the vault (USDC microunits)

lastBlocks.desc: Last block round yield was accrued for this user
